purpose: Public procurement monitoring records for review before CRM import

record.id: stable hash of sourceUrl + noticeId + title

rules: Only public pages and permitted APIs may be captured.
Do not infer a personal contact from a generic company page.
A record cannot enter the CRM until sourceUrl, capturedAt and evidence are present.
Expired or withdrawn notices remain in the audit log but are excluded from active leads.
Supplier registration and tender submission are separate workflows; the monitor never submits bids automatically.
